'''zazhuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadfield|leadfield]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadfield|leadfield]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zazhuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæzhirith|zæzhirith]] || [[word:zæzhirij|zæzhirij]] || [[word:zæzhirish|zæzhirish]] || [[word:zæzhiri|zæzhiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zazhuzhuruth|zazhuzhuruth]] || [[word:zazhuzhuruj|zazhuzhuruj]] || [[word:zazhuzhurush|zazhuzhurush]] || [[word:zazhuzhuru|zazhuzhuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zazhuruth|zazhuruth]] || [[word:zazhuruj|zazhuruj]] || [[word:zazhurush|zazhurush]] || [[word:zazhuru|zazhuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zazhufruth|zazhufruth]] || [[word:zazhufruj|zazhufruj]] || [[word:zazhufrush|zazhufrush]] || [[word:zazhufruf|zazhufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zazhuruthu|zazhuruthu]] || [[word:zazhuruju|zazhuruju]] || [[word:zazhurushu|zazhurushu]] || [[word:zazhuruku|zazhuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zazhuruth|zazhuruth]] || [[word:zazhuruj|zazhuruj]] || [[word:zazhurush|zazhurush]] || [[word:zazhuru|zazhuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zazhuruthul|zazhuruthul]] || [[word:zazhurujul|zazhurujul]] || [[word:zazhurushul|zazhurushul]] || [[word:zazhurukul|zazhurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zazhuruthuthu|zazhuruthuthu]] || [[word:zazhurujuju|zazhurujuju]] || [[word:zazhurushushu|zazhurushushu]] || [[word:zazhuruku|zazhuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zazhuruthun|zazhuruthun]] || [[word:zazhurujun|zazhurujun]] || [[word:zazhurushun|zazhurushun]] || [[word:zazhurukun|zazhurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zazhuruthuoro|zazhuruthuoro]] || [[word:zazhurujuoro|zazhurujuoro]] || [[word:zazhurushuoro|zazhurushuoro]] || [[word:zazhurukuoro|zazhurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
